summary: Comprehensive testing of Unified CMS/CRM system. All features working correctly: Admin login, Unified Products Manager with dual-collection sync (bbq_products + products), Create/Edit/Delete operations, auto-refresh every 5s in admin and 10s on website. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements functional.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent (accessibility improvement, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Unified Products Manager correctly syncs to both bbq_products and products collections
POST /api/bbq-products creates in both collections with proper field mapping
PUT /api/bbq-products/{id} updates both collections maintaining data consistency
Price formatting: bbq_products stores basePrice as number, products stores price as formatted string ($XX.XX)
Auto-refresh intervals: Admin panel 5s, Website 10s - both working
CORS configured correctly with expose_headers=['Set-Cookie'] for cookie-based auth
All form fields present: name, basePrice, description, wagyuUpcharge, grassFedUpcharge, dryAgedUpcharge, meatType, category, ranchOrigin, gradeLabel, genetics, grainFinished
seed_data_creation: Test products created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Products Manager fully functional. Products tab in admin now uses UnifiedProductsManager component which syncs to both bbq_products and products collections. Total 17 products in database (16 original + 1 test product was created and deleted). BBQ Meats tab still exists separately for legacy access. All CRUD operations verified working with dual-collection sync.
